# DesignOS

> The Design Intelligence Operating System for AI coding agents. 60+ opinionated
> markdown modules that teach any agent (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI,
> Windsurf, Cline, Aider…) design taste, process, and a hard quality gate: adversarial
> self-scoring across 6 dimensions with a 95 threshold, sector playbooks for 24
> industries, per-project memory, and zero-dependency validators.

The system is plain markdown plus conventions — an agent "boots" by reading the kernel,
which routes each task to only the relevant modules. Start with the kernel; everything
else is loaded on demand via its routing table.

## Kernel

- [CLAUDE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/CLAUDE.md): the operating kernel — boot sequence, routing table, non-negotiable standards, output contract
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/AGENTS.md): byte-identical kernel mirror for agents.md-standard tools

## How to think

- [brain/design-intelligence.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/brain/design-intelligence.md): the designer's reasoning sequence and known LLM failure modes
- [brain/decision-framework.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/brain/decision-framework.md): how to choose between competing design options
- [brain/quality-bar.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/brain/quality-bar.md): what 95/100 means, calibrated against Stripe/Linear/Vercel/Apple

## Process and quality gate

- [loops/design-loop.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/loops/design-loop.md): research → wireframe → ui → review → a11y → perf → refactor
- [scoring/rubric.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/scoring/rubric.md): the 6-dimension rubric — UI craft, UX, accessibility, performance, modernity, conversion
- [CHEATSHEET.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/CHEATSHEET.md): the whole system compressed to one page of numbers and laws

## Getting started

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/README.md): what DesignOS is, quick start, the five layers
- [GETTING-STARTED.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/GETTING-STARTED.md): five minutes from install to first scored screen
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): control flow diagram and module anatomy
- [integrations/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/integrations/README.md): one export command, every agent
- [adapters/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/adapters/README.md): best working setup per agent surface (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Antigravity)
- [recipes/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/recipes/README.md): copy-ready prompts for high-demand builds — Stripe-level landing, pricing, dashboard, onboarding

## Calibration targets

- [goldens/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/goldens/README.md): best-in-class reference artifacts the rubric's 95 bar is calibrated against
- [references/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/references/README.md): tactic packs distilled from the canon — Stripe marketing, Linear app, Vercel docs, Apple product pages

## Optional

- [GLOSSARY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/GLOSSARY.md): the vocabulary A–Z
- [LIMITATIONS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/LIMITATIONS.md): what DesignOS is not (yet) — honest caveats, including eval status
- [museum/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/museum/README.md): the Anti-Pattern Museum — 40+ cataloged design crimes
- [evals/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ardamoustafa1/DesignOS/main/evals/README.md): the blind benchmark protocol for measuring the system's effect
